result.stderr:
Adliance.AzureTools 1.0.14
Adliance GmbH

  mirror-storage-to-storage    Copies all containers and blobs from one Azure
                               Storage account to another one.

  mirror-storage-to-local      Copies all containers and blobs from one Azure
                               Storage account to a local directory.

  mirror-local-to-local        Copies all subdirectories and files from a local
                               directory to another local directory.

  mirror-local-to-storage      Copies all subdirectories and files from a local
                               directory to an Azure Storage account.

  copy-database                Copies an existing database (structure and data)
                               to another one. If the target database already
                               exists, it will be overwritten. Please note that
                               this uses SqlPackage and currently only works on
                               Windows.

  help                         Display more information on a specific command.

  version                      Display version information.

Adliance.AzureTools 1.0.14
Adliance GmbH

  --help       Display this help screen.

  --version    Display version information.

commands.payload:
Adliance.AzureTools 1.0.14
Adliance GmbH

  mirror-storage-to-storage    Copies all containers and blobs from one Azure
                               Storage account to another one.

  mirror-storage-to-local      Copies all containers and blobs from one Azure
                               Storage account to a local directory.

  mirror-local-to-local        Copies all subdirectories and files from a local
                               directory to another local directory.

  mirror-local-to-storage      Copies all subdirectories and files from a local
                               directory to an Azure Storage account.

  copy-database                Copies an existing database (structure and data)
                               to another one. If the target database already
                               exists, it will be overwritten. Please note that
                               this uses SqlPackage and currently only works on
                               Windows.

  help                         Display more information on a specific command.

  version                      Display version information.

Adliance.AzureTools 1.0.14
Adliance GmbH

  --help       Display this help screen.

  --version    Display version information.

result.stderr:
Adliance.AzureTools 1.0.14
Adliance GmbH

  -s, --source              Required. (Default: ) The connection string to the
                            source database.

  -t, --target              Required. (Default: ) The connection string to the
                            target database.

  -p, --elastic-pool        (Default: ) If set, the target database will be
                            moved to the specified elastic pool.

  -l, --use-local-bacpac    (Default: false) If true and a local BACPAC file
                            exists, then it will be used instead of downloading
                            a new one. This is useful if you want to restore a
                            database often, but not download it all the time.

  -f, --force               (Default: false) Force copy-database operation and
                            skip user confirmation or interaction

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.

staticCommands.name: copy-database
staticCommands.description: Copies an existing database (structure and data) to another one. If the target database already exists, it will be overwritten. Please note that this uses SqlPackage and currently only works on Windows.

options.description: The connection string to the source database.
The connection string to the target database.
If set, the target database will be moved to the specified elastic pool.
Force copy-database operation and skip user confirmation or interaction
If true and a local BACPAC file exists, then it will be used instead of downloading a new one. This is useful if you want to restore a database often, but not download it all the time.

staticCommands.name: mirror-local-to-local
staticCommands.description: Copies all subdirectories and files from a local directory to another local directory.

options.description: The path of the local source directory.
The path of the target local directory.
If true, all files that do not exist in the source will be deleted from the target.

staticCommands.name: mirror-local-to-storage
staticCommands.description: Copies all subdirectories and files from a local directory to an Azure Storage account.

options.description: The path of the local source directory.
The connection string to the target storage account.
If true, all files that do not exist in the source will be deleted from the target.

staticCommands.name: mirror-storage-to-local
staticCommands.description: Copies all containers and blobs from one Azure Storage account to a local directory.

options.description: The connection string to the source storage account.
The path of the target local directory.
If true, all containers and blobs that do not exist in the source will be deleted from the target.

staticCommands.name: mirror-storage-to-storage
staticCommands.description: Copies all containers and blobs from one Azure Storage account to another one.

options.description: The connection string to the source storage account.
The connection string to the target storage account.
If true, all containers and blobs that do not exist in the source will be deleted from the target.
